name: American West Metals Limited
description: American West Metals Limited is an Australian clean energy-focused mineral exploration company. The company is focused on the discovery and development of major copper and zinc deposits in North America, with a portfolio of high-grade projects in Utah, USA, and Nunavut, Canada. Its key projects include the Storm Copper Project, West Desert Project, and Copper Warrior Project, which are strategically located in tier-one mining jurisdictions.
